sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: small amounts can change a whole meal because that leverage matters when the fat quality is good. highly useful in cooking because practical culinary value matters here. helps meals actually work because a fat that people can use well matters more than a theoretical one.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: calorie density is brutally high because tiny serving errors matter here. easy to overpour without noticing because practical portion creep is real. easy to overuse without noticing because liquid calories are slippery in the kitchen.

closing.summary: Avocado Oil has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best in controlled amounts where fat quality is the main reason to use it.
